overall.description: A cinematic third-person perspective walk along a wooden harbor dock in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The scene features a hazy morning atmosphere with warm, diffused lighting, cargo barrels, wooden pallets, and docked ships, transitioning from a moderately crowded dock area to a quieter waterfront view with a large warehouse building.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy wooden harbor dock with cargo and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock through a moderately crowded area with cargo and ships

entered.detail: tall wooden masts of docked sailing ships visible through the haze
wooden cart with large wheels parked on the dock
stacks of wooden barrels and cargo containers lining the dock
black iron lampposts with lanterns mounted on top
piles of wooden pallets and planks stacked on the dock
calm water of the harbor with ships anchored in the distance
industrial buildings and skyline visible through the morning haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wooden harbor dock bathed in warm, hazy morning light. The camera moves forward past cargo barrels and a wooden cart, with tall ship masts visible to the left and the harbor stretching out to the right. Moderate crowds of pedestrians are scattered throughout the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock edge with warehouse and anchored ships

events.description: passing a stationary man by the railing, crowd density decreases significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock past a stationary man and wooden pallets toward the open harbor

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders and orange hair standing still, looking out at the water

entered.detail: large steamship or cargo vessel anchored in the harbor mist
large wooden industrial warehouse with multiple levels on the dockside
wooden railing along the edge of the dock overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking past stacked wooden pallets and a stationary man in suspenders standing by the railing. The crowd thins out as the scene opens toward the harbor edge, revealing a large warehouse building on the right and a prominent ship anchored in the misty water ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a bustling harbor dock that gradually opens into a quieter, mist-shrouded waterfront. It begins amidst a crowd of pedestrians in warm, hazy morning light, gliding past cargo barrels and a wooden cart while tall ship masts loom to the left. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past stacked wooden pallets and a man in suspenders leaning against the railing, while the density of the crowd begins to thin. The perspective then expands toward the harbor's edge, revealing a large warehouse building on the right before finally settling on a prominent ship anchored in the distant misty water.
